case_title: TANG, RICKY et al vs. KONG, KYLE L. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING THE MOTION OF JAMES P. BRADLEY TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF - DEPT. 6 - QUIDACHAY. OSC HEARING ON JULY 5, 1994, DEPT. 4, 2:00P.M.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-04-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-19-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, RICKY CHUNG, JOANNE HEARING SET FOR MAY-12-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF MAY-12-1994, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE MODIFIED ORDER INCLUDING NOTICE OF STATUS CONFERENCE TO OTHER PLTFS & FILING OF DISMISSAL ON BEHALF JEFFREY KWAN WHO APPEARED AND STATED IN OPEN COURT THAT FILING THE DISMISSAL WAS WHAT HE WANTED TO DO.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, RICKY KWAN, JEFFREY CHUNG, JOANNE DOES 1 TO 20 AS TO DEFENDANT KONG, KYLE L. DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-04-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-01-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-15-1994
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR BRADLEY, JAMES PETER AS ATTORNEY FOR KWAN, JEFFREY
NOTICE OF RULING OF GRANTING MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS ATTY FOR PLTF FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, RICKY KWAN, JEFFREY CHUNG, JOANNE
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-19-1994, CONTINUED TO JUL-15-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF ATTY TO NOTIFY PLAINTIFFS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-15-1994, DISMISSAL
